svg.title: IAM Multi-Agent AI System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the multi-agent AI system with a React frontend, Express API gateway, Ollama-powered Orchestrator Agent routing to three specialist agents (SSO, CyberArk, Saviynt), each connected to mock provider APIs, all backed by a local SQLite store.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user interact with in this system?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend design')
g.text: Chat UI · Confirmation cards · Request tracker · shadcn/ui

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the API gateway handle?')
g.text: Auth middleware · Session store · Socket.io · Rate limiting

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Orchestrator Agent work?')
g.text: Intent classification · Slot filling · Supervisor routing · Confirmation gating
Pattern: Supervisor + ReAct · Model: phi3:mini for intent, llama3.1:8b for action

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the SSO Agent handle OIDC and SAML onboarding?')
sendPrompt('How does the CyberArk Agent create and manage safes?')
sendPrompt('How does the Saviynt Agent handle group creation?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the mock Ping Federate API expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the mock CyberArk PVWA API simulate?')
sendPrompt('What Saviynt API operations does the mock server simulate?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored locally in SQLite?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama models should I run locally and why?')
sendPrompt('How is LangChain.js used in this system?')
